{{Quote|You are crazy! Who will follow you into town?....You really are crazy, '''all of you'''!|Raol to Syayna|<ref name="Vader's Quest 4">[[Vader's Quest 4|''Vader's Quest'' 4]]</ref>}}
'''Raol''' was a [[Jazbinan]] resistance fighter for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and lover of [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Syayna]].

==Biography==
Raol assisted during the battle against [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] and his [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] on [[Jazbina/Legends|Jazbina]] with [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. He first housed jealousy against Luke, in the thought that he was trying to take Syayna from him.

{{Char-stub}}
